rationale: Taskmgr.exe (EV-001) accessed lsass.exe with '0x1fffff' (all access) (A0), which is highly unusual for a legitimate Task Manager operation. This access was immediately followed by the creation of a dump file named 'lsass (2).DMP' in a temporary directory (EV-004), strongly suggesting an attempt to dump LSASS memory for credential harvesting.
